title: AI/ML WITH IBM SKILLBUILD
description: Comprehensive AI and ML programme covering neural networks, supervised and unsupervised learning, model evaluation, and real-world deployment using IBM Watson tools and AutoAI.

title: DATABASE FOR DEVELOPERS
description: Oracle-certified course covering relational database design, advanced SQL optimisation, PL/SQL programming, transactions, indexing strategies, and enterprise database management.

title: Industry Communication and Professional Etiquette
description: Industry-focused workshop on professional communication and workplace etiquette, covering email and meeting norms, client interaction, and interpersonal skills for modern software teams

title: Workshop on AI tool and industrial best practices
description: Hands-on workshop on practical AI tools and industrial best practices, covering how to integrate AI into real-world workflows, improve productivity, and apply responsible AI usage in professional settings.
